content:
[Opening Scene: Dynamic business environment]
Voice-over: "You're standing at a pivotal moment in your business journey."

[Cut to success metrics]
VO: "You've achieved success. But you know there's another level waiting."

[Show transformation process]
VO: "The Business Evolution Program transforms how you:
- Make strategic decisions
- Create sustainable growth
- Build powerful systems
- Lead with confidence"

[Client testimonial shots]
VO: "Join entrepreneurs who've transformed their businesses using our proven framework."

[Call to Action sequence]
VO: "Your next level is waiting. Take action now.

Book your strategy session at [website]."

[End card]
Text: "Transform Your Business in 90 Days"
CTA Button: "Book Your Strategy Session"
